name: Hotel Assistant Tool - Search Internal Docs

parameters.jsCode:
const query = String($json.query ?? '').trim()
return [{ json: { query, limit: $json.limit ?? 5, documents: [], warnings: ['Chưa cấu hình Google Drive/vector search cho tài liệu nội bộ. Tool này hiện không gọi API backend vì /internal/chatbot/docs/search chưa tồn tại.'], sources: [{ type: 'drive', name: 'Internal docs search is not configured' }] } }]

const result = $json
const documents = Array.isArray(result) ? result : Array.isArray(result.documents) ? result.documents : Array.isArray(result.data) ? result.data : []
return [{ json: { documents, warnings: result.warnings ?? [], sources: result.sources ?? [{ type: 'drive', name: 'Google Drive / vector document search' }] } }]
